# **Explore Our Schools**

Here you will find contact information, accountability report cards, and website links for all EUSD schools.

[View bell schedules](https://www.eusd.org/page/eusd-bell-schedules)

## **Other Information**

* **Want to know which schools serve your specific neighborhood?**  
  [Try our neighborhood school locator online boundary guide.](https://www.schoolsitelocator.com/apps/escondidounion/accessibilityFocused.html) (Note: if you have trouble accessing the content on the School Site Locator web page, please contact us through our [Website Accessibility page](https://www.eusd.org/page/board-of-education-policies-website-accessibility-and-privacy) to request an alternative solution.)  
* **Are you a prospective parent that is new to EUSD?**  
  Please browse through [Why EUSD](https://www.eusd.org/page/why-eusd): A comprehensive guide featuring our district’s strengths and signature programs  
* **Looking for high schools in Escondido?**  
  Visit the Escondido Union High School District (EUHSD) website: [euhsd.org](http://euhsd.org/)

## **California School Dashboard**

California is field testing a new website designed to help communities across the state access important information about K-12 districts and schools. Called the California School Dashboard, the site features easy-to-read reports on multiple measures of school success, including test scores, graduation rates, English learner progress, and suspension rates. The Dashboard is part of California’s school accountability system based on 2013’s Local Control Funding Formula. It is the next step in a series of major shifts in public education that have raised the bar for student learning, transformed testing, and placed the focus on equity for all students.

* [View the California School Dashboard](http://www.caschooldashboard.org/)  
* [Learn more from the California Department of Education website](http://www.cde.ca.gov/ta/ac/cm/index.asp)

![][image2]

## **Find Us**

Escondido Union School District  
2310 Aldergrove Avenue  
Escondido, CA 92029  
Main: 760.432.2400  
Download our iOS AppDownload our Android App

* Visit us on Facebook  
* Visit us on X, formerly Twitter  
* Visit us on Youtube  
* Visit us on Instagram

![Say Something anonymous reporting system][image3]

**Anonymous Reporting System**: [The Say Something Reporting System](https://www.sandyhookpromise.org/say-something-tips/) allows you to anonymously report safety concerns for observed threats, behaviors, actions, and harassment or to help someone who may hurt themselves or others.  
[**Website Accessibility and Privacy**](https://www.eusd.org/page/board-of-education-policies-website-accessibility-and-privacy) | [**Policies**](https://www.eusd.org/page/board-of-education-policies) | [**Local Control and Accountability Plan**](https://www.eusd.org/page/lcap) **| [Uniform Complaint Procedure](https://www.eusd.org/page/board-of-education-policies-uniform-complaint-procedures)**
